name: k8s Sandbox
desc: Python package that provides a Kubernetes sandbox environment for Inspect.
author: UK AISI

name: Modal Sandbox
desc: Serverless container sandbox for Inspect using Modal's cloud infrastructure.
author: Meridian

name: Daytona Sandbox
desc: Sandbox environment for Inspect using Daytona's cloud infrastructure.
author: Meridian

name: EC2 Sandbox
desc: Python package that provides a EC2 virtual machine sandbox environment for Inspect.
author: UK AISI

name: Proxmox Sandbox
desc: Use virtual machines, running within a Proxmox instance, as Inspect sandboxes.
author: UK AISI

name: Vagrant Sandbox
desc: Use any virtual machine hypervisor supported by Hashicorp Vagrant as Inspect sandboxes.
author: Jason Gwartz

name: Podman Sandbox
desc: Podman-backed sandbox environment for Inspect, enabling containerized tool calls without Docker.
author: Vector Institute

name: Policy Sandbox
desc: Sandbox wrapper that allows fine grained control over command execution and file I/O.
author: Arnab Mitra

name: Inspect Scout
desc: Transcript analysis for Inspect evaluations.
author: Meridian

name: Inspect Viz
desc: Interactive data visualization for Inspect evaluations.
author: Meridian

name: Docent
desc: Tools to summarize, cluster, and search over agent transcripts.
author: Transluce

name: Lunette
desc: Platform for understanding and improving agents.
author: Fulcrum Research

name: Inspect WandB
desc: Integration with Weights and Biases platform.
author: Arcadia

name: Inspect MLflow
desc: Experiment tracking, execution tracing, LLM provider autolog, and artifact logging for Inspect AI evaluations.
author: Debu Sinha

name: CJE
desc: Calibrated judge evaluation — calibrate model-graded scorer accuracy using causal inference with optional oracle labels.
author: CIMO Labs

name: Inspect SWE
desc: Software engineering agents (Claude Code and Codex CLI) for Inspect.
author: Meridian

name: Inspect Cyber
desc: Python package that streamlines the process of creating agentic cyber evaluations in Inspect.
author: UK AISI

name: Inspect Petri
desc: Framework for testing alignment hypotheses end‑to‑end, including automatic scenario generation.
author: Meridian

name: Petri Bloom
desc: Framework for generating multi-turn behavioral evaluations of frontier AI models.
author: Meridian

name: Control Arena
desc: Framework for running experiments on AI Control and Monitoring.
author: UK AISI

name: Linux Arena
desc: Framework for running experiments on AI Control and Monitoring.
author: Redwood Research

name: Inspect Flow
desc: Workflow orchestration for reproducibly running evals at scale.
author: Meridian

name: Inspect Hawk
desc: Platform for running Inspect AI evaluations on cloud infrastructure.
author: METR

name: Evaljobs
desc: Run evals on Hugging Face GPUs and share results and code on the Hugging Face Hub.
author: Hugging Face

name: Inspect VS Code
desc: VS Code extension that assists with developing and debugging Inspect evaluations.
author: Meridian

name: Inspect Costs Plugin
desc: Automatically load pricing data for models under test.
